title: PolicyDecision

id.description: Stable URN identifying this decision record (urn:srcos:decision:<id>).

specVersion.description: Semantic version of the SourceOS spec this record conforms to.

policyId.description: URN of the Policy that produced this decision.

inputs.description: The evaluated subject context, object context, purpose, and environment.

obligations.description: Obligations the accessing subject must fulfil (present when decision is 'permitWithObligations').

issuedAt.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the decision was issued.

expiresAt.description: ISO 8601 timestamp after which the decision must not be acted upon.

decisionHash.description: SHA-256 hash over the canonical JSON of this record for non-repudiation.

description: The immutable, hash-signed result of evaluating a Policy for a specific subject–object–purpose triple, recording the decision outcome and any obligations attached to a permit.
